title: zelkova crenata var. cretica
intro: Zelkova crenata var. cretica, also known as the Cretan or Japanese elm, is a deciduous tree species native to Japan. The medicinal properties of Zelkova crenata var. cretica include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Zelkova crenata var. cretica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
